name: @mcps/sdk
description: MCP-S TypeScript SDK — runtime-evidence security (signed requests, verified responses) for the MCP TypeScript SDK, via a transport adapter over the audited mcps-client-core.
author: Mats Sundvall

scripts.build:native: napi build --platform --release --manifest-path Cargo.toml --output-dir native --js binding.js --dts binding.d.ts
scripts.build:native:debug: napi build --platform --manifest-path Cargo.toml --output-dir native --js binding.js --dts binding.d.ts
scripts.build: npm run build:native && npm run build:ts
